resources.string: Detects text selection in any app and displays a floating radial command menu. Logs searchable clipboard history.
Menu. Tap to expand, drag to move.

Select any text in any app — a floating radial menu appears.

 ◈ Tap center button to expand or collapse
 ◈ Drag center button to reposition (remembered)
 ◈ Auto-hides after 15 seconds

 Actions:
 Share → system share sheet
 Copy → copies to clipboard
 Clip (tap) → overwrites clipboard
 Clip (↑ swipe) → prepends to clipboard
 Clip (↓ swipe) → appends to clipboard
 Paste → pastes into focused field
 Tasker → broadcasts TEXT_SELECTED
 History → opens searchable clip log
All clipboard entries saved locally (max 50 MB).
Drag to reorder · toggle to enable/disable
Custom intent action for Tasker integration

ClipBub Deep — Quick Reference

 SETUP
 1. Tap “Enable Accessibility Service”
 2. Find “ClipBub Deep Service” and enable it
 3. Return here — status dot turns teal when active

 USING THE MENU
 Select any text in any app. The floating menu appears.
 Tap the center button to expand the orbit.
 Tap any action button to execute.
 Drag the center button to move the menu anywhere on screen.
 Position is remembered between sessions.

 CLIP BUTTON GESTURES
 Tap → overwrite clipboard with selection
 Swipe up → prepend: selection + existing
 Swipe down → append: existing + selection

 HISTORY
 Every clipboard change is logged automatically.
 Open History to browse, search, and re-copy past entries.
 Long-press an entry to delete it.
 Maximum storage: 50 MB (oldest entries auto-pruned).

 TASKER
 The Tasker button broadcasts the intent:
 com.haunted421.clipbubdeep.TEXT_SELECTED
 Extras: text, source_package, timestamp
 Customize the action string in Settings.

 ACTION CUSTOMIZATION
 Go to Settings → Customize Actions to reorder buttons
 and enable or disable individual actions.

 SUPPORTED APPS
 Works in any app including web browsers (Chrome, Samsung
 Browser), PDF viewers, e-readers, and all standard text
 fields. Uses clipboard intercept for apps that do not
 expose text through the standard accessibility API.
